title: A wet night
question: 把今天课文里“户外活动很开心，但要判断地面和天气”的线索放进现代 campsite 或 outdoor picnic 场景——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个提醒各填一个空、用 word bank 里的词或短语。
example_answer: I don't think we should put the tent here. This place is too low. If it rains heavily, water may flow under the tent. Let's move it to higher ground.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 选择帐篷位置：我建议不要在这块低地搭帐篷
options.english_template: I don't think we should ___ the tent here.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 解释天气风险：如果雨下得很大，水可能会流到这里
options.english_template: If it rains ___, water may flow here.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 说明真正原因：一条临时小溪可能正好从帐篷下面流过
options.english_template: A stream may form and flow ___ the tent.
